calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Jun-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Kelly appeared via zoom for Roy Woodard (petitioner).

Mr. Kelly stated that there is a buyer for the property, that the payoff amount is less than what is required by HUD, and that they are trying to work with HUD to resolve the issues.

The matter is continued to June 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear (Issued To Administrator Roy Woodard)
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Kelly for administrator Roy Woodard (via Zoom).
Mitchell Buracio, real estate agent (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on: 1) Status on Close of Estate; and 2) Order to Show Cause re Sanctions.

The Court addressed the Order to Show Cause re failure to appear. Mr. Kelly stated that he believed he had appeared at the prior hearing before a different judge and was unsure why the Order to Show Cause had issued. The Court noted that no appearance had been made at the last hearing and declined to impose sanctions.

Mr. Kelly reported that the estate's real property had been marketed for an extended period due to its condition and that a buyer had been secured for $600,000, below the appraised value. He further reported that the property is subject to a reverse mortgage and that negotiations with the lender are ongoing to address costs of sale and related expenses. A recent reappraisal by the lender valued the property at approximately $530,000.

Mr. Kelly stated that he intends to file a petition to confirm sale once those issues are resolved and notice is provided.

The matter was continued to May 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Continued To Mar-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The matter was called for hearing on status on close of estate.

The Court continued the matter to March 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and stated that an Order to Show Cause re sanctions in the amount of $250 would issue to attorney Mark Kelly for failure to appear.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Continued To Jan-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mark Kelly appeared via zoom for Roy Woodard (petitioner).

Mr. Kelly explained to the Court that he had issues with file serve and express regarding the sanction's payments, and that he will send out a check today. He also stated that they been trying to work with the lender, and that they are waiting for the HUD approval. The matter is continued to January 26, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Jul-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Kelly for Roy Woodard, Administrator (via Zoom).
Mitchell Barocio, Real Estate Agent, is present (via Zoom).

The Court addressed Mr. Kelly's failure to appear at the prior hearing on March 25, 2025. Mr. Kelly explained that he had a conflicting matter at the same time and mistakenly believed that a return of sale would be filed and generate a new hearing date. He acknowledged the error and accepted responsibility. The Court imposed sanctions in the amount of $250 for failure to appear and reminded Mr. Kelly of a prior sanction order that remains outstanding. The Court ordered that both sanctions be resolved within 10 days.

Discussion was held regarding the status of the estate. Mr. Kelly reported that the estate property is in poor condition and subject to a reverse mortgage exceeding its value. As a result, no lenders are willing to finance the purchase, and the estate will proceed with a short sale. Previous buyers have withdrawn upon learning of the required confirmation of sale process and the short sale status. However, a new buyer has now been identified and is willing to proceed. Mr. Kelly requested a continuance of the status hearing to allow time to complete the sale process and prepare for a return for confirmation of sale.

The court continued the status hearing on close of estate to July 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause were ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear (For Administrator Roy Woodard)
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Continued To Apr-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court noted that attorney Mark Kelly failed to appear at the previous hearing on February 24, 2025, and again failed to appear or provide good cause today.

Sanctions in the amount of $250 were imposed on attorney Mark Kelly for nonappearance on February 24, 2025. The court will issue an Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause for attorney Mark Kelly to appear on April 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to explain why further sanctions in the amount of $250 should not be imposed on them for their failure to appear today. The hearing on status on closing the estate is also continued to the same date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Continued To Mar-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court noted that neither counsel nor the administrator appeared for the hearing. The court continued the matter to March 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. An Order to Appear shall be issued to both attorney Mark Kelly and Administrator Roy Woodard to appear at the hearing. An Order to Show Cause shall also be issued to Mark Kelly to explain why $250 in sanctions should not be imposed for their failure to appear.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Continued To Feb-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mark Kelly appeared via zoom for Roy Woodard (petitioner).
Mitchell Barocio appeared via zoom (real estate agent).

Mr. Kelly stated that this estate only has one asset, that the house is in Visitation Valley, and that he will contact the reverse mortgage company to see he can work something out.Mr. Barocio stated that the house is in poor condition, that he listed the house for $749,000.00 and then lowered the price to $687,000.00, that there is a balance of $617,000.00 as of July 11, 2024, and that there has not been interest shown buy potential buyers. The matter is continued to February 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Nov-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Kelly appeared by zoom for and with Roy Woodard in person.
Realtor also present by zoom.

Mr. Kelly stated that he double booked and that it is not an excuse for not appearing at the last hearing. Sanctions in the amount of $250.00 are ordered against Mr. Kelly and are to be paid within 10 days. The parties reported that the intent is to sell the property, that the property is only lot value, that there is an issue of an outstanding reverse mortgage, that they are trying to get information as to the exact amount that is owed, that offers are coming in at a $300,000.00 range, that interest on the reverse mortgage has been accruing for the last two years, that Mr. Woodard wants to get it off the books, etc. Mr. Kelly stated that they need to get a reappraisal, that they may have to negotiate with the reverse mortgage company and suggested a 90-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear/order to show cause is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Continued To Aug-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Roy Woodard and the Attorney Mark L. Kelly to appear on August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Mr. Kelly to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is continued to August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Kelly appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that it sees a petition, but no notice of hearing or a proposed order. Mr. Kelly informed the court that they need to return a potential sale to the court and that it is a difficult property to sell. The Petition to Approve Status Report, etc., is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for June 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Kelly appeared by zoom for Roy Woodard (administrator).

Mr. Kelly provided an oral report as to the status of the real property. The Report on Status of Administration is continued to April 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mr. Kelly that he needs to resolve all of the procedural issues.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
